# Grime to Prime BBQ Grill Cleaning Service
# North County San Diego, CA
# Last updated: 2026-05-04

> Professional BBQ grill cleaning and restoration service serving Encinitas,
> Carlsbad, Oceanside, San Marcos, Vista, Solana Beach, Del Mar, Rancho Santa Fe,
> and Escondido in North County San Diego. Specializes in deep cleaning gas grills,
> charcoal grills, kamado grills, and pellet smokers using food-safe, residue-free
> products. Owner-operated, licensed, and insured.

## Services
- Full BBQ grill deep clean (disassembly, degreasing, burner inspection, reassembly)
- Kamado / ceramic grill cleaning
- Pellet grill and offset smoker cleaning
- Built-in outdoor kitchen grill cleaning
- Grill restoration (rust treatment, grate refurbishment)
- Commercial restaurant and food-truck grill cleaning

## Service Area
North County San Diego: Encinitas, Carlsbad, Oceanside, San Marcos, Vista,
Solana Beach, Del Mar, Rancho Santa Fe, Escondido.

## Pricing (2026, flat rate)
- Kamado / Big Green Egg: $120
- Standard 2–4 burner gas grill: $160
- Large 5–6 burner / built-in outdoor kitchen grill: $200
- Smoker / pellet grill / commercial: from $220
- Second grill cleaned same visit: $40 off
